The terminal appears to have processed the command but I can't see the output due to scroll position. Let me just proceed to write the Python script to create the image. If Pillow is not available, I'll install it first. ## Action: Type a multi-line Python script via a here-document to create the QUOTE-1.jpg image and execute it. ## Code: ```python pyautogui.typewrite("""python3 << 'EOF' from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont import os # Create 1080x1080 image with orange background img = Image.new('RGB', (1080, 1080), '#FF9900') draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img) # Draw white circle (900x900) in center center_x, center_y = 540, 540 radius = 450 # 900/2 draw.ellipse( [center_x - radius, center_y - radius, center_x + radius, center_y + radius], fill='#FFFFFF' ) # Draw black text "QUOTE" in center # Try to find a suitable font try: # Try system fonts font_paths = [ '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/noto/NotoSans-Bold.ttf', '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf', '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/freefont/FreeSansBold.ttf', '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/LiberationSans-Bold.ttf', ] font = None for path in font_paths: if os.path.exists(path): font = ImageFont.truetype(path, 150) break if font is None: font = ImageFont.load_default() except: font = ImageFont.load_default() # Get text bounding box bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), "QUOTE", font=font) text_width = bbox[2] - bbox[0] text_height = bbox[3] - bbox[1] # Center the text text_x = (1080 - text_width) / 2 text_y = (1080 - text_height) / 2 # Draw text draw.text((text_x, text_y), "QUOTE", fill='#333333', font=font) # Ensure output directory exists os.makedirs(os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output'), exist_ok=True) # Save image output_path = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output/QUOTE-1.jpg') img.save(output_path, 'JPEG', quality=95) print(f"Image saved to: {output_path}") EOF""", interval=0.01) ```

Let me write a clean Python script that will create the image according to the specifications: - 1080x1080 pixels - Orange background (#FF9900) - White circle (900x900) in center - Black text "QUOTE" in center using #333333 - Save as ~/Desktop/output/QUOTE-1.jpg I'll write the script to a file using `cat` with a heredoc. Let me make sure I do this correctly this time. I'll write it to `create_image.py` and then run it. Actually, looking at the previous issue, the problem might have been that when I typed the heredoc with `python3 /tmp/create_image.py << 'PYEOF' from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont import os # Create image with orange background width, height = 1080, 1080 img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), '#FF9900') draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img) # Draw white circle in center (900x900) circle_size = 900 circle_x = (width - circle_size) // 2 circle_y = (height - circle_size) // 2 draw.ellipse([circle_x, circle_y, circle_x + circle_size, circle_y + circle_size], fill='#FFFFFF') # Draw text "QUOTE" in center try: font = ImageFont.truetype("/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf", 150) except: font = ImageFont.load_default() # Get text bounding box bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), "QUOTE", font=font) text_width = bbox[2] - bbox[0] text_height = bbox[3] - bbox[1] # Center the text text_x = (width - text_width) / 2 text_y = (height - text_height) / 2 # Draw text draw.text((text_x, text_y), "QUOTE", fill='#333333', font=font) # Ensure output directory exists os.makedirs(os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output'), exist_ok=True) # Save image output_path = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output/QUOTE-1.jpg') img.save(output_path, 'JPEG', quality=95) print(f"Image saved to: {output_path}") PYEOF""", interval=0.01) ```

I'll write it in a clean format. ## Action: Type the Python image-generation script into the nano editor. ## Code: ```python pyautogui.typewrite("""from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont import os # Create image width, height = 1080, 1080 img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), '#FF9900') draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img) # Draw white circle draw.ellipse([90, 90, 990, 990], fill='#FFFFFF') # Draw text font = ImageFont.load_default() bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), 'QUOTE', font=font) text_width = bbox[2] - bbox[0] text_height = bbox[3] - bbox[1] text_x = (width - text_width) / 2 text_y = (height - text_height) / 2 draw.text((text_x, text_y), 'QUOTE', fill='#333333', font=font) # Save os.makedirs(os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output'), exist_ok=True) path = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/output/QUOTE-1.jpg') img.save(path, 'JPEG', quality=95) print('Saved:', path)""", interval=0.01) ```
